base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of mario_poseset — a character (playable) from 1988 super mario bros 2. Mario — stand/walk/run/jump/lift/throw/climb/swim/duck/crouch-jump/hurt/dead/door-enter. Balanced stats. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
